User.title: User Profile and Settings
User.description: User configuration, backup choices, security settings, and encrypted fields metadata

securityPin.description: Optional encrypted or hashed security PIN to lock sensitive data

isEncryptionEnabled.description: Whether notes and names are encrypted on the client before saving

Occasion.title: Occasion
Occasion.description: An event or social occasion where Noqoot or gifts are exchanged

title.description: Name or title of the occasion (can be encrypted)

notes.description: Detailed notes about the event (can be encrypted)

totalReceived.description: Cached total monetary Noqoot received for this occasion

totalPaid.description: Cached total monetary Noqoot paid for this occasion

NoqootTransaction.title: Noqoot Transaction or Gift
NoqootTransaction.description: A specific gift or monetary Noqoot record associated with an occasion and a person

type.description: Whether the Noqoot was received from someone or paid to someone

personName.description: The name of the donor or recipient (can be encrypted)

amount.description: The monetary amount in local currency

giftType.description: Whether the gift is money (Noqoot) or a physical product

giftImageUrl.description: Illustrative image URL of the gift

isRepaid.description: For received: has this been paid back? For paid: was this a payback of previous received?

repaymentDueDate.description: Due date for reciprocation or repayment

purchaseLink.description: Direct online store link for buying the gift

UpcomingOccasion.title: Upcoming Occasion
UpcomingOccasion.description: A scheduled future occasion which is tracked for reminders and coordination

title.description: Title or name of the upcoming occasion

/users/{userId}.description: Individual user preferences and global settings

/users/{userId}/transactions/{transactio.description: Monetary Noqoot and gifts recorded under various occasions

/users/{userId}/upcoming_occasions/{upco.description: Future scheduled events tracked by the user
